reasoning: α,α,α-trifluoro-4-nitro-m-cresol is a benzene ring bearing a hydroxyl group (phenol), a nitro group, and a trifluoromethyl group (CF3 replacing the methyl of m-cresol). The most specific classification is as a nitrophenol, as it contains both the phenolic OH and a nitro substituent on the benzene ring.
